comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Implemented session-file scoped loop ownership. RED tests: test/loop-engine-service.test.ts 'uses session files, not project session ids, for loop ownership' and test/autoresearch-tool-runtime.test.ts 'starts child sessions when terminals share a project session id'. Fix: LoopEngine/autoresearch ownership matching and loop ownership validation now compare LoopSessionRef.sessionFile only. Review agent approved with no findings. Verification: cd extensions/tau && npm run gate passed (655 tests; existing lint warnings only).
